items.name: djinni
items.take_refuse_string: The 10 foot tall djinni glares at you.

items.name: peel
items.examine_string: a slippery banana peel that looks like it could cause a nasty fall if someone stepped on it...

rooms.name: Tower Cell
rooms.description: in a cramped stone cell at the top of a lonely tower. The air is hot and dry, and the only light comes from a small barred window high above. The stone walls are rough to the touch, and the mournful sound of a lone crow echoes through the silent room.

items.name: door
items.description: iron-clad door with a small barred window
items.location_description: is set into the east wall.
items.open_action_description: Surprisingly, the cell door is not locked. It creaks open, revealing a small antechamber beyond.

east.refuse_string: The cell door is firmly shut.

rooms.name: Cell Antechamber
rooms.description: a small antechamber just outside the tower cell. Light streams in through a narrow window, casting long shadows across the stone floor. The air is cooler here, but an uneasy stillness hangs over the room. There is a door to the north that is strongly bolted shut from the outside.

items.name: trapdoor
items.locked_state_description: A closed and locked rusty iron trapdoor
items.unlocked_state_description: A closed but unlocked rusty iron trapdoor
items.unlockable_description: The trapdoor is locked and you need a key
items.opened_state_description: An open trapdoor. A slick fireman's pole leads from it down into the deep darkness below

items.name: pole
items.examine_string: a firestation-type pole that is slathered in slippery grease
items.take_refuse_string: The pole is firmly anchored and your efforts to take it only result in you getting your hands covered in grease.

containers.name: body
containers.examine_string: The lifeless body of a prison guard lies slumped on the floor, his uniform stained with what looks like remains of his lunch.
containers.take_refuse_string: You can't take the body, but you can search it if you like.

items.name: pack of cigarettes
items.description: an empty crumpled pack of cigarettes

items.name: lighter
items.ignite_success_string: You flick the lighter and a small flame appears.

items.name: torch
items.lit_state_description: an old wooden torch that is burning brightly, casting flickering shadows on the walls

features.name: window
features.description: a narrow barred window is set high in the wall, allowing a thin shaft of light to pierce the gloom.
features.examine_string: it is set high in the wall, allowing a thin shaft of light to pierce the gloom. The bars are made of sturdy iron and are firmly embedded into the stone, making escape through the window impossible.

features.name: door
features.description: a sturdy wooden door is set into the north wall.
features.examine_string: that its surface is scarred with scratches and dents. It is firmly bolted shut from the outside, and there is no handle or keyhole visible.

down.go_refuse_string: The pole descends into utter darkness. Did you want to slide down?
